message:
feat(console): Add comprehensive table renderers and stats integration

- Add ToolTableRenderer for tool registry display with parameter info
- Add ResourceTableRenderer for resource display (partial: needs URI templates)
- Add PromptTableRenderer for prompt display with argument details
- Fix type mismatches: prompt.arguments is Vec, not Option<Vec>
- Fix OverflowMethod import from rich_rust::text
- Add stats collection integration to Server struct
- Export ServerStats and StatsSnapshot from fastmcp-server

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
